word: G206 - ἄκρον - ákron - ak'-ron - One end… other

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἄκρον

- Transliteration: Akron

- Phonetic: ak'-ron

- Definition:

1. the farthest bounds, uttermost parts, end, highest, extreme

a. of the earth

b. of heaven

- Origin: neuter of an adj. probably akin to the base of G188

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Neuter of an adjective probably akin to the base of G188; the extremity: - one end... other tip top uttermost part.
